title: Seafarer Research and Development
content:
SECTION 213. Research Studies. - The Administration, in coordination with other entities, shall conduct periodic research and studies on labor supply, especially as it relates to the monitoring of the supply of seafarers vis-à-vis the demand for them in international shipping.

SECTION 214. Manpower Development Program. - The Administration shall establish linkages with government agencies and other concerned sectors in the development and provision of assistance programs for the training of seafarers.

SECTION 215. Training Programs and Standards. - The Administration shall coordinate with private entities, government agencies and employers concerned in the formulation of training programs and standards.
